events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a cotter pin omitted on a castle nut in suspension & steering work. This is a safety-critical defect - castle nuts require cotter pins to secure them and prevent loosening. This is non-compliant and installed-defective.

  "rationale": "A castle nut without a cotter pin is an incomplete and non-compliant fastener installation.
